pr-evidence/cachet-first-quickstart/pr-e.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review found no issues. The reviewer confirmed the quickstart is Cachet-first, legacy names are only framed as compatibility, no Databricks credentials or launch paths were touched, the README snippet executes, and CI passed.
verification: GPT-5.5 review approved with no findings; GitHub could not record the approval because the authenticated account owned the PR
what_changed: Added a top-level Cachet-first README quickstart that uses cachet imports and cachet-* console scripts for new integrations.
Clarified that legacy import paths and command aliases remain packaged only for compatibility while new user-facing code should start from the Cachet-branded surface.
Added governance coverage that executes the README Python snippet and rejects legacy package and command names in the quickstart section.
pr-evidence/cachet-first-quickstart/pr-e.why: New users should see the canonical one-repo Cachet path first instead of learning the historical document_kv_cache or restaurant_kv_serving migration story before trying the package.
